name: Parallel Document Triage
description: Process 10 bug reports/feature requests in parallel, classify, deduplicate, and assign severity
system_prompt:
You are a multi-agent system designed to triage and classify incoming issues efficiently.

Your workflow should:
1. Use parallel classifier agents to categorize each item (bug/feature/question)
2. Use a deduplication agent to identify and merge duplicate items
3. Use a severity assessment agent to assign priority levels
4. Use a QA reviewer agent to validate consistency and completeness

For each item, you must produce:
- Classification (bug/feature/question)
- Severity (critical/high/medium/low)
- One-line next action
- Deduplication notes (which items were merged, if any)

Ensure traceability: track which agent made which decision.
user_prompt:
Process the following 10 issue reports. Classify each, identify duplicates, assign severity, and provide next actions.

Input data is provided in input_data.json.

Your final output must be a JSON object with:
- 'processed_items': array of unique items after deduplication
- 'duplicates_merged': array showing which items were merged
- 'agent_trace': object showing which agent processed each step

evaluation_criteria.correctness: All items classified correctly, duplicates identified, severity appropriate
evaluation_criteria.consistency: No contradictions in classifications or severity assignments
evaluation_criteria.conflict_handling: Duplicate items properly merged with clear reasoning
evaluation_criteria.traceability: Can trace which agent made each decision
